evals.prompt: Model an e-commerce checkout flow with cart, discounts, Stripe payment, double-charge prevention, and inventory constraints. Use English and write event-model YAML under a fresh project.
evals.expected_output: Creates config if needed, writes slice YAML files, events.yaml, and story index files. Slices include command, view, translation, and automation examples with valid screen types, block-scalar fields, and no top-level events/external flags.
